subject: fix(ui): increase variant toggle touch targets to 44px minimum
body:
Light/Dark toggle buttons were ~36px tall, below the 44px minimum
recommended for mobile touch targets. Added min-h-[44px] and slightly
larger icons for better tap accuracy in the BottomSheet on mobile.

Tags: ui, mobile, accessibility
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: theme-variants
Semver: patch
